rulings.Case Title: CALVIN OXFORD et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Reconsideration Of Order Determining Issues To Be Retried, Based Upon New And Different Facts [Ccp § 1008 (B)]
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFF Calvin Oxford's MOTION For Reconsideration Of Order Determining Issues To Be Retried, Based Upon New And Different Facts [Ccp § 1008 (B)] is continued to July 8, 2010 at 9:30 am in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. =(220/HEK)
